channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump’s teleprompter operator under investigation for insider trading, sources say
item.description: The federal agency that regulates prediction markets is investigating President Trump’s longtime teleprompter operator for potential insider trading, according to sources familiar with the matter.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Karoline Leavitt returns to White House briefing room after maternity leave
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt returned to the briefing room Thursday after maternity leave, reflecting on motherhood and public service.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lightning release 2026-27 regular season schedule
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning announced its 2026-2027 regular season schedule on Thursday with a new total of 84 games.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Canadian wildfire smoke brings hazardous air to the US Midwest
item.description: Americans across the Upper Midwest are dealing with some of the worst air quality in the world as wildfire smoke from Canada blankets the region.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Will a tropical storm form in the Gulf this weekend?
item.description: Forecasters are watching a potential tropical disturbance in the northeastern Gulf that could bring heavy rain and flooding risks to Florida.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] 5-year-old on scooter hit by car in North Port
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Fentanyl, cocaine cache found in Bradenton home, police say
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] 'Pray for them,' Florida sheriff says after two deputies shot
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Judge seeks proof 'Alligator Alcatraz' is actually shut down

item.description: 7/16/26 Statewide Council on Human Trafficking Services and Resources Committee first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/16/26 Statewide Council on Human Trafficking Services and Resources Committee first appeared on The Florida Channel

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/16/26 Florida Defense Support Commission
item.description: 7/16/26 Florida Defense Support Commission first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/16/26 Florida Defense Support Commission first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Sen. Mark Kelly wants more men in classrooms through new legislation
item.description: Sen. Mark Kelly is promoting bipartisan legislation aimed at recruiting more teachers and expanding mentorship opportunities for young men.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] This rule could deny green cards to immigrants who use public benefits
item.description: The Trump administration is reviving a rule that could deny green cards to immigrants who use public benefits that could include food stamps, Medicaid, housing vouchers and others.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Alternative bill to permanent daylight saving time gains support from doctors, lawmakers
item.description: Doctors and lawmakers are backing a proposal for permanent standard time as an alternative to year-round daylight saving time.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 2 of 8 men charged in alleged plot to attack the White House UFC event plead not guilty
item.description: Two of the eight men indicted in an alleged drone and sniper plot to attack President Donald Trump's UFC cage-fighting show on the White House lawn pleaded not guilty to federal conspiracy charges.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 2 deputies, suspect shot on West Shell Point Road in Ruskin: HCSO
item.description: Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister said two deputies have been shot after an incident on Thursday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Nearly 100 cases of cyclosporiasis in Florida
item.description: Cases of the parasitic infection, Cyclosporiasis have nearly doubled in the last week across the state of Florida according to Florida Department of Health reporting.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Midyear money checkup: Experts say small changes now can lead to stronger finances by year's end
item.description: It's the midpoint of the year, and financial experts say now is a good time to reassess your finances and make adjustments before 2026 ends.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Two more of Brad Pitt’s kids want to ditch his surname
item.description: Two of Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie's children, Zahara and Maddox, have filed court petitions in California to legally drop Pitt's surname, citing personal reasons.

item.title: [BREAKING] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 2 Hillsborough deputies injured in Ruskin shooting: Sheriff
item.description: Two Hillsborough County deputies were flown by helicopter to Tampa General Hospital after being shot Thursday on West Shell Point Road in Ruskin.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] BREAKING: 2 Hillsborough County deputies shot, medevaced to Tampa General Hospital

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lumber spill shuts down southbound Interstate 75 in Hillsborough: FHP
item.description: A tractor-trailer driver was cited on Thursday after the lumber he was hauling spilled onto Interstate 75 in Hillsborough County, troopers said.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Blue Angels jet flies too close to crowd at Pensacola Beach
item.description: A US Navy Blue Angels jet flew too low over a crowd at Pensacola Beach in Florida on Wednesday, July 15.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Blue states hit hardest by Trump disaster aid denials, analysis says
item.description: AP analysis finds Trump is taking longer to approve disaster aid, with denials disproportionately affecting Democratic-led and blue states.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Pluto flyby mission wakes up after long sleep nearly 6 billion miles from Earth
item.description: A groundbreaking mission that explored Pluto and distant solar system objects in unprecedented detail has awakened from its longest sleep ever.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] NYT files motion to quash subpoenas served over Air Force One coverage
item.description: David McCraw, the newspaper's senior vice president and deputy general counsel, accused the government of bringing the subpoenas in "bad faith to punish The Times for its coverage."

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Texas floodwaters surge toward Camp Mystic area one year after deadly floods
item.description: Texas crews raced to rescue stranded residents as dangerous flooding surged near Camp Mystic, reviving memories of last year’s deadly disaster.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Chatbots could be at risk of spreading government restrictions on online speech
item.description: Ask Claude to make a pamphlet critical of President Donald Trump or Britain's King Charles III, and Anthropic's chatbot would oblige.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: city council] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Clearwater City Council to vote on 30-year Duke Energy deal
item.description: After years of analysis into whether Clearwater should operate its own electric utility, city leaders are expected to take up a proposal Thursday to extend the city's partnership with Duke Energy.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Semi spills load on I-75 after sudden braking
